narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2024-54529. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1190, T1068, T1542, T1476. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-12 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1190, T1203, T1078, T1195. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 14 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1190, T1547, T1036, T1566.001. Average risk score: 9.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 6 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-66376. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1595, T1547, T1059.001, T1566.001. Average risk score: 9.4/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-IR-02 has been observed in 9 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1190, T1485, T1027, T1036. Average risk score: 8.4/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 32 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1486, T1036, T1056.001, T1078.001. Average risk score: 8.4/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 7 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1190, T1547, T1486, T1539. Average risk score: 8.1/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.
Threat actor CDB-FIN-07 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1547, T1203, T1555, T1078. Average risk score: 7.2/10.
Threat actor CDB-CN-01 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1547, T1059, T1203, T1078. Average risk score: 6.7/10.

Threat actor UNC-UNKNOWN has been observed in 220 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2018-25225, CVE-2026-4908, CVE-2026-33696, CVE-2026-33751, CVE-2026-4993. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1412, T1190, T1204, T1486, T1036. CRITICAL: 42 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 5.8/10.

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE - quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto - quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
